channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Vampire: The Masquerade – Eternal Whispers revealed as a top-down CRPG
item.content:encoded:
Vampire: The Masquerade – Eternal Whispers has been revealed, conjuring up a top-down CRPG within the World of Darkness setting and building on the Vampire: The Masquerade – Chapters narrative board game.

Set in Montreal, the typical vampire politicking and back-stabbing is taking place. Waking up after decades of torpor, you’ll have to investigate your own past, navigate an unfamiliar vampire society, and then shape the world through choices and deep roleplaying. It’s a familiar sounding set up – one that is an echo of Bloodlines 2 – though what comes from that beginning can go in very different directions. In particular, failure is absolutely a possibility here, reshaping the continuing narrative in a “fail forward” fashion.

Here’s the synopsis:

Montreal has changed.

The Sabbat is gone. New powers rule from the shadows. Old loyalties have decayed beneath neon lights, abandoned cathedrals and the ruins of forgotten faiths.

You are Gabe, a vampire awakened from decades of torpor with fractured memories and a past buried deeper than the dead. Guided by Sam, a reluctant Thin-Blood, what begins as a hunt for a rogue ghoul spirals into a dangerous conspiracy tied to the Temple of Eternal Whispers, a vast underground cathedral built in devotion to a forbidden faith.

Your return was no accident.

As you investigate the mystery surrounding your forgotten past, you uncover disturbing truths about the Sabbat. Your release sets forgotten forces into motion, while something ancient still lies buried beneath the city, a secret capable of reshaping Montreal’s undead society forever. The deeper you delve into your connection with the Temple of Eternal Whispers, the more you unravel the darkness buried within yourself. Will you embrace the monstrous legacy of your Sabbat origins, or fight to preserve the last remnants of your humanity?

Co-Founder and Creative Director at Flyos, Gary Paitre, said, “I’ve been playing Vampire: The Masquerade TTRPG for more than 25 years. The universe, its themes and the stories it creates have stayed with me for most of my life. That passion eventually pushed me to create Vampire: The Masquerade — Chapters, our narrative board game adaptation of the license, and later became the driving force behind Vampire: The Masquerade — Eternal Whispers.

“With Eternal Whispers, our ambition is to deliver a mature and atmospheric CRPG that sits at the crossroads of classic role-playing games and modern narrative experiences such as Disco Elysium. We want to create a game where personal horror, exploration, and meaningful choices are just as important as atmosphere and storytelling.”

Source: press release



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/07/vampire-the-masquerade-eternal-whispers-revealed-as-a-top-down-crpg/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: See more Total War: Warhammer 40,000, and sign up for the closed beta
item.content:encoded:
Creative Assembly shared a little more footage of Total War: Warhammer 40,000 with parts of the team talking about the game’s development. They’re not yet ready to discuss release dates, but you can sign up to the closed beta here, which will take place later this year.

As was recently teased, Armageddon is an early focal point for the game, the planet that is repeatedly the nexus of the war between Orks and the Imperium – And yes, Yarrick and Ghazghkull Thraka will be able to face off. It’s not clear if that’s the latest war for Armageddon, or if the team are choosing one of the earlier wars as a starting point to grow from.

One of the key areas that Creative Assembly is working to capture is the vast scale of the built up planets. Hive worlds, mining worlds and other parts of the Imperium’s galactic industrial complex will be represented, and then beyond that you have different planetary biomes. Heading down to the planet for battle, and vast hive cities can tower over the battlefield.

For the first time, CA is having to represent not just a continent or two, not even just a single planet or world, but entire solar systems and sectors for the first time. Solar systems can have multiple planets that you will fight across for supremacy. Naturally, with such a broad canvas, they’re able to claim that every playthrough will pan out differently.

Four factions will be playable to start with – Space Marines, Orks, Eldar and the Astra Militarum (AKA the Imperial Guard) – and you’ll have the ability to customise your troops, choosing colours, emblazening uniforms and armour with particular iconography and also affecting their gameplay style. Change a combat philogophy, arm them with tactical abilities, signature traits and arcane wargear.

Total War: Warhammer 40,000 is in development for PC, and coming to PS5 and Xbox for the first time in the series’ history.



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/07/see-more-total-war-warhammer-40000-and-sign-up-for-the-closed-beta/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Signet City is the next game from the Citizen Sleeper team
item.content:encoded:
Jump Over The Age has announced Signet City, a new narrative RPG that aims to bring a new perspective to its storytelling.

Coming from the team behind Citizen Sleeper’s acclaimed dice-based RPG, Signet City is a post-punk setting filled with ecological collapse and govenernment overreach, inspired by the 1980s in the UK and how it affected cities of the North.

A distinctive element is the art style, which draws upon black and white photography, screentoned manga and pen and ink drawing for its monochrome visuals.

The experience plays out in the first person, though, as you are both a parasite and host, choosing paths and actions to navigate the world. Once again, you’ll be rolling dice in a tabletop-inspired RPG system, though here the emotions of your host will affect the chances of success.

via Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/07/signet-city-is-the-next-game-from-the-citizen-sleeper-team/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
